info.title: zerotrust API
info.description: Zero-trust authentication and authorization API. Built on PASETO v4, ABAC/RBAC, device attestation, and continuous access evaluation.

password.description: Must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character

post.summary: Rotate refresh token and issue new access token
Revoke all sessions for the authenticated user
Generate an ephemeral OAuth state token (PKCE/nonce)

get.summary: Begin OAuth authorization flow (returns the provider's authorize URL)
get.description: Generates a CSRF state and (where supported) a server-side PKCE pair, then returns the provider authorization URL the client should navigate to. The PKCE code_verifier never leaves the server.

Provider redirects here with an authorization code. On success the server creates a session, stores the tokens under a one-time exchange code, and 302-redirects to the frontend at /login?oauth_code=<code>. The SPA redeems it via POST /auth/oauth/exchange.

302.description: Redirect to the frontend with a one-time oauth_code (success) or an error query param

400.description: Missing code, invalid/expired state, or PKCE failure

post.summary: Redeem a one-time OAuth exchange code for tokens
post.description: Exchanges the single-use code delivered to /login?oauth_code=<code> for the access and refresh tokens. Keeps tokens out of the URL/history.

200.description: Reset code sent (response is identical whether email exists or not)

post.summary: Initialize TOTP setup — returns secret and QR code

qrDataUrl.description: Data URI for QR code image

post.summary: Verify TOTP code and activate TOTP MFA

200.description: TOTP activated — backup codes returned once

400.description: Invalid code or TOTP not enabled

post.summary: Redeem a backup code for authentication
Send OTP via email, SMS, WhatsApp, or Telegram

target.description: Email address, phone number, or Telegram chat ID

get.summary: List active sessions for authenticated user

post.summary: Issue a short-lived scoped workload credential

patch.summary: Update user status, roles, or displayName (admin only)

delete.summary: Soft-delete user and revoke all sessions (admin only)

get.summary: List all sessions for a user (admin only)

delete.summary: Revoke all sessions for a user (admin only)
Revoke a specific session by ID (admin only)

post.summary: Approve a JIT grant request (admin only)
Deny a JIT grant request (admin only)

delete.summary: Revoke an approved JIT grant (admin only)

post.summary: Receive a Security Event Token (SET) from a provider
